info.name: DJ Mark Stott, Ceroc Music Requests
info.description: Live event and track request system for Ceroc dance events where DJ Mark Stott is performing.

list.name: list_ceroc_events
list.description: Returns a list of upcoming Ceroc dance events DJ Mark Stott is performing.

list.name: search_ceroc_tracks
list.description: Searches DJ Mark's music library for a specific track to see if it is available for request.

query.description: The name of the artist or track to search for.
